    If you want to save RigidBody objects (linear + angular velocity) then you should do it in PhysicsLoop to ensure that the call won't be invoked during the simulation run.

    • saveState

      public void saveState(String path, boolean build)
      If you want to save RigidBody objects (linear + angular velocity) then you should do it in PhysicsLoop to ensure that the call won't be invoked during the simulation run.
